title: Linage, please allow registration for the journalists

replies.msg: Whitelist the email address domains of the press to allow them to register accounts, so that they can chat with us directly.
Just an section “World” is not enough
We need interaction, they need accounts

Good idea.
Shall we create a tweet to tell the world that we have an English sub-page now?
Not easy for Linage to do so. I can imagine wumaos will flood into the World and the channel will be full of spams
no la, on.cc sell cocaine, will erode here

5 demands, not one less

1. Allow account registration for foreigners
2. English version of LIHKG
3. Sub-sections for “World”, e.g. English, Japanese, Korean, others
4. We, as a LIHKGer, be nice to foreigners
5. Thank Linage very much

FYI, Linage （連尼住）is the creator of LIHKG

quote.msg: Not easy for Linage to do so. I can imagine wumaos will flood into the World and the channel will be full of spams

replies.msg:
Wumaos are already everywhere
Just block the IP addresses from China should be good enough

Should we use formal English or Konglish?

I suggest formal English
this will make preventing 5cents more difficult. but gotta find some way
